case_title: JAMES R. ARNOLD VS. BEHRUZ VAHDANI et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ARNOLD, JAMES R. DBA THE ARNOLD LAW PRACTICE, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI, BEHRUZ MATRIX SEISMIC CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY ARNOLD, JAMES R. DBA THE ARNOLD LAW PRACTICE, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP VAHDANI, BEHRUZ MATRIX SEISMIC CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI, BEHRUZ
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, JAMES R. DBA THE ARNOLD LAW PRACTICE, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, JAMES R. DBA THE ARNOLD LAW PRACTICE, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-29-14 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, JAMES R. DBA THE ARNOLD LAW PRACTICE, A SOLE PROPRIETORSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VAHDANI, BEHRUZ MATRIX SEISMIC CORPORATION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $148.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,148.00, CORRESPONDENCE BETWEEN THE PARTIES INDICATES DEFENDANTS COMMUNICATED TO PLAINTIFF AN UNWILLINGNESS TO PAY OUTSTANDING INVOICES UNTIL THE "OUTCOME" OF THE CASE. YET, PLAINTIFF CONTINUED TO BILL TO THE MATTER, AGREEING TO PUT THE INVOICES "ON HOLD." FURTHER REVIEW OF THE INVOICES DATED NOVEMBER 30, 2005 REVEALS THAT THE MAJORITY OF THE ENTRIES INVOLVE TRYING TO COLLECT THE OUTSTANDING INVOICES, AND NOT LEGAL WORK. BASED ON THE ABOVE, DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PAY $3,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT VAHDANI, BEHRUZ MATRIX SEISMIC CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MATRIX SEISMIC CORPORATION
